title: calanthe lutea
intro: Calanthe lutea, also known as the yellow calanthe, is a type of orchid native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Calanthe lutea include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
